_comment: THE HELD-OUT EVAL SET. Read scripts/eval-assistant.mts for how it is scored.
Rule: no message here may appear VERBATIM in data/finetune.jsonl. `npm run check:data`
enforces it, and scripts/gen-synthetic.mjs drops any generated example that collides.
Until 2026-07-10 this file did not exist, the cases lived inside the eval script, and 24 of
the 56 were verbatim training strings. Every score from v4 to v7 was partly a memorization
score. The numbers moved when the cases were rewritten; the model did not change.
Near-duplicates ARE allowed, and wanted. 'i ate pizza for breakfast on Monday' in training
against 'i ate pizza for lunch on monday' here is the whole point: it asks whether the model
reads the sentence or pattern-matches the dish and the day. v7 answered 'breakfast'.
A case with no `tool` must NOT touch the plan — it answers or asks for clarification.
